name: VBS Jungle
description: Tropical jungle vibes with leaves and dappled sunlight — perfect for jungle-themed Vacation Bible School. Includes bonus jungle phrases and kids' Bible trivia.

triviaQuestions.q: Who did God use to lead His people out of Egypt?
Who was swallowed by a big fish?
How many days did it rain during Noah's flood?
Who was thrown into the lion's den?
Who killed Goliath with a sling?
What is the first book of the Bible?
How many disciples did Jesus choose?
What did Jesus turn water into at a wedding?
Who was the strongest man in the Bible?
What wall fell down when the Israelites marched?
